mapper.select: SELECT product_no, active, product_name, product_type, base_rate, max_rate, min_period_month, max_period_month, min_amount, max_amount, target_large, target_detail, description, interest_payment_type, product_tendency, status, product_start_dt, product_end_dt FROM products WHERE product_no = #{productNo} AND active = 'Y'

SELECT terms_code, product_no, terms_title, terms_type, required_yn, pdf_path, terms_text, use_yn FROM product_terms WHERE product_no = #{productNo} AND use_yn = 'Y' ORDER BY required_yn DESC, terms_code
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_terms WHERE product_no = #{productNo} AND required_yn = 'Y' AND use_yn = 'Y'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM product_terms WHERE product_no = #{productNo} AND required_yn = 'Y' AND use_yn = 'Y'
AND terms_code IN
#{termsCode}
AND 1 = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO id_verifications ( verification_no, user_no, product_no, verification_status, verification_method, ocr_provider, matched_name_yn, matched_birth_yn, fail_reason, verified_dt, expired_dt, created_dt ) VALUES ( #{verificationNo}, #{userNo}, #{productNo}, #{verificationStatus}, #{verificationMethod}, #{ocrProvider}, #{matchedNameYn}, #{matchedBirthYn}, #{failReason}, #{verifiedDt}, #{expiredDt}, SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO product_subscriptions ( subscription_no, product_no, user_no, rate_no, type, acnt_no, currency_code, amount, period_month, verification_no, subscription_status, subscribed_dt, maturity_dt, applied_rate, rate_changed_dt ) VALUES ( #{subscriptionNo}, #{productNo}, #{userNo}, #{rateNo}, #{type}, #{acntNo}, #{currencyCode}, #{amount}, #{periodMonth}, #{verificationNo}, #{subscriptionStatus}, SYSDATE, #{maturityDt}, #{appliedRate}, SYSDATE )
INSERT INTO required_terms_agreements ( required_agreement_no, subscription_no, terms_code, agreed_yn, agreed_at ) VALUES ( seq_req_terms_agr.NEXTVAL, #{subscriptionNo}, #{termsCode}, 'Y', SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO optional_terms_agreements ( optional_agreement_no, subscription_no, terms_code, terms_title, agreed_yn, agreed_dt ) VALUES ( seq_opt_terms_agr.NEXTVAL, #{subscriptionNo}, #{termsCode}, #{termsTitle}, 'Y', SYSDATE )

INSERT INTO electronic_signatures ( signature_no, subscription_no, user_no, verification_no, signature_path, signed_content, signed_dt ) VALUES ( #{signatureNo}, #{subscriptionNo}, #{userNo}, #{verificationNo}, #{signaturePath}, #{signedContent}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT ps.subscription_no, p.product_name, u.name_ko AS user_name, ps.acnt_no, ps.currency_code, ps.amount, ps.period_month, ps.applied_rate, ps.subscribed_dt, ps.maturity_dt, ps.subscription_status FROM product_subscriptions ps JOIN products p ON ps.product_no = p.product_no JOIN users u ON ps.user_no = u.user_no WHERE ps.subscription_no = #{subscriptionNo}
